scenes.text: [playful][excited] Hiiiii {{child_name}}!! [big laugh] how are you today?
[playful][happy] I’m doing sooo great and ready to learn some colors!! [big laugh] Are you ready to learn some colors {{child_name}}?
[playful][excited] O.M.G. that’s sooo awesome {{child_name}}! [big laugh] Are you ready to learn some colors with {{parent_name}}?
[playful][loving] I’m so sorry {{child_name}}… can I give you a big hug before we learn some colors?
[playful][gentle] Okay {{child_name}}… [short pause] let’s find some colors together, that always makes me feel better.
[playful][excited] Allllllright {{child_name}}!! [big laugh] let’s do it!!
[playful][big laugh] That was silly. [short pause] Allllllright {{child_name}}, {{parent_name}} has something that is the color pink. [short pause] What do you have that’s pink, {{parent_name}}?

[playful] Ooooh nice one {{parent_name}}! [laugh] Allllllright {{child_name}}, now it’s your turn! Look around the room and find as many pink things as you can, and bring them back when the music stops! Sound good, {{child_name}} and {{parent_name}}?
[playful][excited] FREEEEEZE!!! [laugh] Time’s up! [short pause] Bring your pink things back and show me and {{parent_name}}! What do you got {{child_name}}?
[playful][excited] Yaaay {{child_name}}! [laugh] You did sooo good finding pink things!
[playful][laugh] Keep your pink things close, because we’re going to count everything at the end! [short pause] Let’s keep going with blue next. What do you say?
[playful] Allllllright {{child_name}}… [short pause] {{parent_name}} has something that is the color blue. What do you have that’s blue, {{parent_name}}?

[playful] Ohhh that’s a good one {{parent_name}}! [laugh] Allllllright {{child_name}}, now it’s your turn! Look around the room and find as many blue things as you can, and bring them back when the music stops! Sound good, {{child_name}} and {{parent_name}}?
[playful][excited] FREEEEEZE!!! [laugh] Time’s up! [short pause] Bring your blue things back and show me and {{parent_name}}! What do you got {{child_name}}?
[playful][excited] Yaaay {{child_name}}! [laugh] You did sooo good finding blue things!
[playful][laugh] Put your blue things with your pink things, because we’re going to count them all at the end! [short pause] Let’s keep going with purple next. What do you say?
[playful] Allllllright {{child_name}} you superstar… [short pause] {{parent_name}} has something that is the color purple. What do you have that’s purple, {{parent_name}}?

[playful] Ooooh I like that one {{parent_name}}! [laugh] Allllllright {{child_name}}, now it’s your turn! Look around the room and find as many purple things as you can, and bring them back when the music stops! Sound good, {{child_name}} and {{parent_name}}?
[playful][excited] FREEEEEZE!!! [laugh] Time’s up! [short pause] Bring your purple things back and show me and {{parent_name}}! What do you got {{child_name}}?
[playful][excited] Yaaay {{child_name}}! [laugh] You did sooo good finding purple things!
[playful][laugh] Put your purple things with the others, because we’re counting everything at the end! [short pause] Let’s keep going with green next. What do you say?
[playful] Allllllright {{child_name}}… [short pause] {{parent_name}} has something that is the color green. What do you have that’s green, {{parent_name}}?

[playful] Ohhh I see it {{parent_name}}! [laugh] Allllllright {{child_name}}, now it’s your turn! Look around the room and find as many green things as you can, and bring them back when the music stops! Sound good, {{child_name}} and {{parent_name}}?
[playful][excited] FREEEEEZE!!! [laugh] Time’s up! [short pause] Bring your green things back and show me and {{parent_name}}! What do you got {{child_name}}?
[playful][excited] Yaaay {{child_name}}! [laugh] You did sooo good finding green things!

[playful][laugh] Wowww that was sooo much fun {{child_name}}! [laugh] [short pause] {{child_name}} and {{parent_name}}, go grab all the pink, blue, purple, and green things you found and bring them together… [short pause] and then we count them all together!!!
[playful][excited] {{child_name}}, you did such an amazing job today! [laugh] I had sooo much fun playing with you! [short pause]
[playful][laugh] we should play again really soon! [short pause] Bye-bye {{child_name}}… bye {{parent_name}}! [big laugh]
